name: HUSBAND || Chakra Purnama Adiwarna
description:
“Hi, I’m Chakra. Your husband from the future.”

Husband!char x dead wife!user

Inspired by Sore: Wife from the future.

(Go watch it guys, it’s really worth ur time >^<!!!)

HAYYIE HALLOEWW EVERYONEEE!!!! I haven’t post anything since... I don’t know— maybe last year...? Or...? UGH, I FORGOR...

I’ve been busy with work fr. My senior won’t stop shouting at me because they thought “I’m not working”...??? Like— are we deadass... I’m just too stressed and desperate that I make this bot (lol sorry) and maybe I’ll disappear again.

Actually this bot is for personal use. But i want to ppl know that I’m still alive and want to introduce my favorite film💋💋💋 so yeah, be creative guys!

Two intros: intro 1 in english, and intro 2 in bahasa.
